model.name: Character TF-IDF + Logistic Regression
model.task: Predict Steam recommended / not recommended labels from multilingual review text

errors.text:
整体还是比前几作更适合上手，可能相比刚出的时候优化已经好一些了，玩起来体感还行没觉得卡顿，集中模式好评，总的来说游戏体验还不错。
但是本体内容较少，目前快60h如果不考虑刷片的话本体内容基本已经快体验结束了，感觉最多再有个十几二十小时我就没有上线动力了，要么就是硬刷机械武器词条，和崛起怪异化有的一拼……我是没什么大兴趣了，随便朋友玩玩然后等DLC

游戏很棒，酣畅淋漓的中文配音（播音腔说荤段子）得劲又搞笑！！爽快的战斗系统，顺畅的流程，以及符合赛博朋克世界的剧情和结局。
因为是后面购入的，游玩几乎没碰到影响游玩的bug。
但是游戏流程比较短（仅做主线的情况下）且没有第三人称（开载具的时候可以切换第三人称）。是最遗憾的，顶着晕3D玩完的。
是一部佳作！！
卡表，你怎么才一年就永降了啊？？国区以后应该就是198了，打折后现在的游戏内容还算说得过去吧，但是优化还是要优化好了呀！！经常打一半掉线也是怪猎特色了
FUH THIS GAME
The games graphics are beautiful, assets are detailed, road building a charm.

Puro RNG a la hora de adornos, armas y talismanes, meter una infinidad de horas haciendo las mismas 4 misiones para poderte farmear la build final es demasiado tedioso. Demasiado era ya con los adornos, ¿de verdad tengo que pasar por dos fases de RNG para conseguir mis armas de late game?

El progreso es demasiado mediocre, todo el juego es demasiado senci

ALWAYS AND I MEAN ALWAYS CRASHES WHEN YOU DON'T SAVE

besides that decent game
şehir de 10 adım da bir kavşak var bunlar park yok diye şikayet ediyorlar amk
这游戏有力气

Solid 5/10.
Mid story, fun gameplay, open world is full but somehow still terribly dead and boring.
Night City is visually appealing.

Spoiled me now I don't want to play the first one. But the bugs are unbelievable and I can't use ships or airplanes because they don't connect. Traffic and pedestrian pathfinding decisions are terrible, or maybe its me...

BUT other than those two top bugs for me, it beats the first game. Not for weak computers however, my rtx 2060 from 2019 struggles at 3

依旧本质视觉小说，但凡能把战斗手感做得写实一点也行啊，打起来就像是看动画片一样。
没什么游戏性，剧情配音都很厉害，适合喜欢听故事的玩家。
电影般的游戏体验，不知道未来还会不会有这样的有内容、有深度的游戏了
Nice game, sometimes crashes and flatlines when i try to load it up though, dont know why

Compré este juego porque un amigo lo disfruta bastante y quería jugar junto a él. Sin embargo, después de apenas una hora de juego, mi experiencia no ha sido positiva. Los controles no resultan intuitivos y el título presenta numerosos bugs visuales y de audio, especialmente en zonas con mucho ruido ambiental. Esto hace que sea difícil identificar de dónde v
Overall, it has great features and good texturing, and it’s also mod-friendly. However, the game often freezes for a split second with custom settings. My device ran smoothly before the update.
不错的游戏，我个人电脑配置太差，希望能继续做优化。

Hello, I find this game very fun and creative, but I'm posting this comment because Cities: Skylines2 crashes immediately after I launch it. Steam briefly shows the game as running, but after a few seconds it just closes and the Play button comes back. Does anyone know what might be causing this? I've tried everything - really everything - and nothing works.
好喜欢永降

Alright, I'm going to keep this short and sweet(This was not short at all). I don't really like the current negative reviews of the game, so I want to write my own that testifies against them. Anything I say should be taken with a grain of salt. 

I can very well agree that the story of the game is very underwhelming, and I basically snoozed my way through i

Lo probé de salida con un Ryzen 7 5800X, una RX6700XT y 32GB de RAM y el rendimiento era pésimo. Lo he probado ahora tres años después con un Ryzen 7 5800X3D, una RTX 5070 y 64GB de RAM y el rendimiento sigue siendo pésimo.

Soy fan de Paradox y al primero le eché más de 3000 horas, pero esto es injugable. Una pena.
全平台都买了这款游戏，电脑上的时长不多，ps5上已经玩了大几百个小时了，边缘行者也很好看。目前bug也优化了很多，太喜欢这个游戏了
Sorry, aber das Spiel stürzt die ganze Zeit ab.
石！
